title: Make Delhi cleaner and greener: CM to residents
fullText:
Delhi CM Rekha Gupta during inauguration of NDMC Flower Festival at Cannaught Place in New Delhi.
 | Photo Credit: SHASHI SHEKHAR KASHYAP
 Delhi must set an example in cleanliness and greenery, Chief Minister Rekha Gupta said on Tuesday as she inaugurated a four-day flower festival at the Central Park in Connaught Place.More than 15,500 flowers of 48 different varieties will welcome visitors at the festival organised by the New Delhi Municipal Council (NDMC). The Chief Minister called on residents to help make the city cleaner, greener and more beautiful. “Earlier, people travelled to Kashmir to see tulips, but now due to the dedicated efforts of the NDMC, citizens can enjoy tulips and a wide variety of flowers in the Capital itself,” Ms. Gupta said, describing the event as a “selfie festival” and a major attraction for visitors. Published - March 04, 2026 01:04 am IST
